basic_details.job_title: CSIR NAL Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 21 Project Associate, Project Assistant Posts
basic_details.short_information: National Aerospace Laboratories (CSIR NAL) Recruitment 2026 for 21 posts of Project Staff. Candidates with B.Sc, Diploma, B.E/B.Tech Can attend Walkin. The Walkin Interview on 26-05-2026, 29-05-2026. For detailed information please visit CSIR NAL official website.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Sc./3 years Diploma in Engineering/Technology, Masters/Integrated Masters from a recognized University, Bachelor's degree in Engineering or Technology from a recognized University, SSC/10th plus ITI

seo_tags: National Aerospace Laboratories Project Assistant-II/ PA-II
